features: HAPPY HALLOWEEN Air Fill Foil Letter Balloon Kit 34cm

description: HAPPY HALLOWEEN Air Fill Foil Letter Balloon Kit 34cm Sold: Single Kit contains: 14 x letter foil balloons - 34cm / 13 in. 1 x ribbon 1 x plastic straw. Air inflation only. Self sealing. Not suitable for helium gas. Helpful information: Balloon is refillable. Air temperature may cause balloon to look underinflated. Keep the straw to refresh the balloon if needed. Balloon delivered flat.
